_schema.op: string identifier of the op (matches the folder name)
_schema.dtype: input/output dtype shared by all cases: bf16 | f16
_schema.default_tiling: tiling kwargs passed to flydsl_hgemm; per-case keys override
_schema.cases: list of shape/config entries; each must define name, m, n, k
_schema.cases[].name: unique label for the case
_schema.cases[].m: rows of a / output (a is [m, k])
_schema.cases[].n: rows of b / output cols (b is [n, k]); n % tile_n must be 0
_schema.cases[].k: shared contraction dim; (k / split_k) % tile_k must be 0
_schema.cases[].<tiling>: optional per-case overrides: tile_m, tile_n, tile_k, split_k, block_m_warps, block_n_warps, b_to_lds

description: out[m, n] = sum_k a[m, k] * b[n, k]  (out = a @ b.T), fp32 accumulation
